_meta.author: grok-sprint-2026-07-18
_meta.note: VA hour sprint: FXBG roster re-verify + Spanberger 2026 reproductive-freedom / sports-vote source append. No reset_unspecified. Evidence only where HARD cited.

profile.confidence_note: 2026-07-18: appended governor.virginia.gov Dobbs/contraception statement + Reproductive Freedom Amendment ballot + prior House sports vote + Mercury on-the-record.

abigail-spanberger.notes_append: [2026-07-18 sprint] HARD: Signed Right to Contraception Act; June 2026 Dobbs anniversary statement defending reproductive rights (governor.virginia.gov). HARD: Signed bill placing Virginia Right to Reproductive Freedom Amendment on Nov 3 2026 ballot (Ballotpedia; Planned Parenthood Action 2026-02-06). HARD (prior House): NAY Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act 2023 (clerk.house.gov/Votes/2023192) per Virginia Mercury 2025-09-09. SOFT: Mercury — would veto further abortion restrictions; opposes Youngkin bathroom/pronoun school policies; LGBTQ student rights.

0.note: As governor: signed contraception act; put reproductive freedom constitutional amendment on 2026 ballot; Dobbs-anniversary statement defending abortion access framework

4.note: On the record: would absolutely veto further abortion restrictions

0.note: House NAY on Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act; opposes sex-based bathroom/pronoun school policies per Mercury

1.note: Pledged protect LGBTQ student rights; opposed Youngkin parental-notification-style school gender policies

kerry-devine.notes_append: [2026-07-18] Official roster confirms Kerry P. Devine Mayor At-Large term through Dec 31 2027. https://www.fredericksburgva.gov/263/Council-Members

matt-rowe-fxbg.notes_append: [2026-07-18] Official: Matt D. Rowe Ward 1 term Jan 1 2026–Dec 31 2029 (fredericksburgva.gov/263). Nov 2025: 56.4% over Gantt/Cropper (Fredericksburg Free Press).

profile.confidence_note: 2026-07-18 roster re-verify — term Jan 1 2026–Dec 31 2029; first Black woman on council

joy-crump-fxbg.notes_append: [2026-07-18] Official: Joy Y. Crump Ward 2 term Jan 1 2026–Dec 31 2029. Nov 2025: defeated Anne Little 1360–1190; first Black woman on FXBG City Council; female-majority council (Free Press 2025-11-04).
